summary: Group Deal Payment Flow Refactor v294 testing complete. All 19 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend verified: (1) Join returns status='pending_payment' with commitment_ref, count does NOT increment. (2) Submit payment endpoint changes status to 'payment_submitted'. (3) Admin pending payments section shows commitments awaiting approval with Approve buttons. (4) Admin approve payment changes status to 'committed' and NOW increments campaign count + buyer_count. (5) Track Order page handles GDC-refs with proper error handling. (6) Full UI flow: Join modal → Payment proof form → Payment submitted state with Track CTA.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed campaigns and commitments for payment flow testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment flow refactor v294 verified. Key changes: (1) POST /api/admin/group-deals/campaigns/{id}/join returns status='pending_payment' with commitment_ref (like GDC-XXXX-YYYYYY). Count does NOT increment on join. (2) POST /api/public/group-deals/submit-payment accepts commitment_ref and payment details, changes status to 'payment_submitted'. (3) GET /api/admin/group-deals/commitments/pending-payments lists commitments awaiting admin approval. (4) POST /api/admin/group-deals/commitments/{ref}/approve-payment changes to 'committed' and NOW increments campaign count + buyer_count. (5) GET /api/public/group-deals/track?ref=GDC-XXXX returns commitment + campaign status. (6) GET /api/public/group-deals/track?phone=+255XXX returns all commitments for phone. (7) Finalize only picks 'committed' (approved) commitments, not pending ones. (8) Cancel handles all states (committed + pending_payment + payment_submitted → refund_pending). (9) Duplicate join prevention still works (same phone blocked). (10) Track Order page now handles GDC-refs with proper error handling for 404s.

details: Count does NOT increment on join
Buyer count does NOT increment on join
GET /api/admin/group-deals/commitments/pending-payments lists commitments with payment_submitted status
Returns customer_name, customer_phone, amount, payment_proof, payment_submitted_at
NOW increments campaign count by quantity
Rejects commitments in pending_payment status (must submit payment first)
Same phone blocked from joining same campaign twice
GET /api/public/group-deals/track?phone=+255XXX returns all commitments for phone
Finalize only includes commitments with status='committed'
Cancel marks committed, pending_payment, and payment_submitted for refund
Track Order page detects GDC- prefix
Displays group deal status with campaign progress
Proper error handling for 404 (commitment not found)
Join modal with name, phone, quantity
Payment proof form with payer name, amount, bank reference, payment method, date
Payment submitted state with commitment ref, amount, status
'Invite friends to unlock faster' CTA with WhatsApp and Copy Link
Lists customer name, phone, campaign, units, amount, bank reference
Approve button for each pending payment

fixes_applied.issue: Track Order page showed runtime error overlay when searching for invalid GDC reference
fixes_applied.fix: Added try-catch around the GDC track API call to properly handle 404 errors and display user-friendly error message
